response.justification: Candidate has roughly 14 years of solid full-stack and systems engineering experience, but the role explicitly requires director-level IC seniority with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, and cloud/AI platform strategy depth. The resume shows only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP generators) without evidence of building or shipping AI products at scale, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI platform direction.
strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded
Founder experience with GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or recognized AI expertise
Lacks principal/director-level IC scope and strategic advisory experience
No evidence of cloud platform strategy or large-scale cloud architecture leadership

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Broad engineering versatility and entrepreneurial background
